NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-09-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PHILIP MAHER'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION FROM PLAINTIFF MELANIE BUTLER-GAUTHIER, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION OF DEFENDANT PHILIP MAHER FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING PLAINTIFF MELANIE BUTLER-GAUTHIER TO PROVIDE COMPLETE AND FULLY CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO DEFENDANT'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION IS GRANTED WITH ALL SUCH RESPONSES DUE WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. THE COURT FURTHER AWARDS SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF FOR THE FEES AND COSTS INCURRED BY DEFENDANT IN BRINGING THE MOTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $1365 TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT JAMESHFLEMING@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories; Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production From Plaintiff Melanie Butler-Gauthier, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. CARSON NEWTON, Esq. of Law Offices of Gene J. Goldsman (Tel: 714-541-3333) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PHILIP MAHER's Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories; Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production From Plaintiff Melanie Butler-Gauthier, And Request For Sanctions.

The Court indicates plaintiff's counsel did not properly contest the Court's tentative ruling and notify opposing counsel of his intent to appear at today's hearing.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion of Defendant Philip Maher for an order compelling Plaintiff Melanie Butler-Gauthier to provide complete and fully code-compliant responses without objections to defendant's first set of special interrogatories, form interrogatories and requests for production is granted with all such responses due within 30 days of the date of this Order. The Court further awards sanctions against plaintiff for the fees and costs incurred by defendant in bringing the motion in the amount of $1365 to be paid within 30 days of the date of this Order.

The prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at jameshfleming@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
